title: NERV Germany any infos on that
display_title: NERV Germany any infos on that
wikitext:
[]: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Wed Dec 09, 2015 1:47 pm I need some info if there are any on the German NERV branch, who's the CEO etc... Is there any thing official to go on?

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Wed Dec 09, 2015 3:26 pm No answer's fine than I will invent something. What about that: Asukas father is the boss of NERV-Germany. That would be funny cause she always picks at Shinji that he got his piloting position only because of his gendo.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Wed Dec 09, 2015 4:04 pm As far as I know there's more canon information on the Nevada branch of NERV than there is on the German branch. With the Nevada branch we got to see it briefly in both NGE and the Rebuild, but as far as the German branch goes all I've ever heard about it is: it exists, it is large enough to have at least one eva stationed there, and Asuka is from there.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 09, 2015 4:49 pm You see the name of the branch commander in Eva 2.0 when Misato gets a message in her car, right before Eva-02 is dropped. Also, going by the locations of Magi systems in EoE, the branch would be in either Hamburg or Berlin.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by TraxXavier » Wed Dec 09, 2015 5:12 pm Darn it. and I liked the idea so much... anyhow since Berlin is a sump I will go with Hamburg.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Dec 09, 2015 6:55 pm According to the Task 02 order when Unit 02 deploys in 2.22, Asuka's home base is commanded by General James Henderson.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Fri Dec 11, 2015 4:33 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: According to the Task 02 order when Unit 02 deploys in 2.22, Asuka's home base is commanded by General James Henderson.

[]: Re: NERV-Germany any infos on that?             Quote Post by mammaluser » Sun Apr 03, 2016 5:39 pm I have no idea, altought there is one thing that i know of in ANIMA i think that the german branch rebels and they send Shinji or something to attack it, but so far as other info nope i dont know any.
